stocks.impact_theory: MongoDB reported Q4 FY2026 earnings beating estimates with $1.65 EPS (vs $1.46 exp) and $695M revenue (+27% YoY), but provided weak FY2027 guidance due to slower Atlas growth and macro pressures. Economic implications include reduced cloud spending amid inflation fears from Middle East crisis. Market psychology: sell-the-news after beat, fear of recession hitting software. Historical parallels: Snowflake SNOW -30% post-earnings 2024 despite beat. Analogies: 1. Like a runner beating personal best but slowing pace, disappointing spectators. 2. Overhyped party where drinks run low early.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings beat overshadowed by soft guidance; X sentiment negative on growth slowdown; web news highlights tumbling stock despite numbers.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Limited rebound +5% if market stabilizes; enter >260.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Earnings reaction overdone, potential buyback; broader tech rally.

stocks.justification: Clear earnings catalyst with consistent post-earnings drops in peers; high volume confirms sentiment shift.

stocks.impact_theory: KTB beat Q4 estimates, reported strong revenue growth post-Helly Hansen acquisition, guided FY2026 revenue $3.4-3.45B and EPS $6.40-6.50 (above consensus). Econ: resilient consumer spending on brands like Wrangler. Psych: relief rally in cyclicals amid market turmoil. Historical: Similar to PVH +15% post-guidance 2023. Analogies: 1. Like a ship steadying after storm with full sails. 2. Underdog boxer landing knockout punch.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Beat and raised guidance; top gainer lists; positive X mentions on apparel resilience.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Fade rally -8% to 70; if consumer weakens.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Geopolitical oil spike hits spending; overbought.

stocks.justification: Strong fundamentals but sector sensitive to macro.

stocks.impact_theory: Billionaire TSLA holder Leo KoGuan bought 1M NVDA shares (~$180M), plans more; calls AI not bubble, foundational layer. CLSA PT $300. Econ: Validates AI capex amid hyperscaler spend fears. Psych: Vote of confidence from whale lifts dip-buyers. Historical: ARK buys sparked 2023 rallies. Analogies: 1. Whale jumping back in pool calms nervous swimmers. 2. Veteran general reinforcing troops.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: High-profile buy and analyst reiterate; X buzzing positively, counters recent AI fatigue.

stocks.justification: Influential insider action; consistent AI narrative strength.

stocks.impact_theory: TSLA gapped up premarket breaking $400 on Elon AGI humanoid comment; despite recent community divide and overnight dip. Econ: Autonomy/robotics long-term vs EV slowdown. Psych: FOMO on Musk vision overrides noise. Historical: 2020 splits rallied on tweets. Analogies: 1. Rollercoaster thrill after dip scares riders. 2. Prodigal son returning to cheers.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket surge; X hype on AGI; counters bearish community posts.

stocks.justification: Volatile sentiment; depends on macro auto.

stocks.impact_theory: Reports Palantir provided data fusion for Iran op (satellite/drone real-time); stock up on Middle East escalation validating defense AI. Econ: Boosts gov contracts amid war. Psych: 'War stock' premium. Historical: NOC/LMT surges in conflicts. Analogies: 1. Swiss army knife in battlefield toolkit. 2. Oracle of war seeing hidden patterns.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Geopolitical tie-in; X mentions military use; web articles on defense rally.

stocks.justification: Timely but speculative link; strong YTD performance.
